config.errors.deadletterqueue.topic.name: cpg.nodes.dlq
config.neo4j.cypher.topic.cpg.nodes: WITH event AS v MERGE (n:CpgNode {id: v.node.id}) SET n.type = v.node.type, n.label = v.node.label, n.code = v.node.code, n.start_line = v.node.start_line, n.end_line = v.node.end_line, n.scope_id = v.node.scope_id, n.file_id = v.file_id, n.rel_path = v.rel_path, n.file_hash = v.file_hash
